hero.title: KORA RIMWE v2
hero.subtitle: Urubuga rwa mbere rwizewe kandi rw'ubuntu rwo kwiga amategeko y'umuhanda n'ibimenyetso mu Rwanda.

features.subheader: Uburyo bworoshye bwo gutsindira uruhushya rwawe rwa burundu cyangwa urw'agateganyo.
features.lessonsDesc: Amasomo yose ateguye neza akurikiza integanyanyigisho yemewe mu Rwanda.
features.practiceDesc: Ibizamini byinshi by'imyitozo bigufasha kwitegura neza no gutsinda neza.
features.roadSignsDesc: Sobanukirwa buri kimenyetso cyose cy'umuhanda n'icyo gisobanura.

learningBenefits.title: Kuki ukwiye kwigira kuri KORA RIMWE?
learningBenefits.benefit1Desc: Nta kiguzi na gito usabwa ngo ubone amasomo n'imyitozo.
learningBenefits.benefit2Desc: Urukurikirane rw'amasomo n'ibizamini rutegeye buri wese haba kuri terefoni cyangwa mudasobwa.
learningBenefits.benefit3Desc: Ibibazo byose n'amasomo bihuye neza n'ibibazwa mu kizamini nyacyo cy'amategeko y'umuhanda.

faq.title: Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa
faq.q1: Ese uru rubuga ni ubuntu koko?
faq.a1: Yego, Kora Rimwe ni urubuga rw'ubuntu 100% rwashyiriweho gufasha Abanyarwanda kwiga amategeko y'umuhanda mu buryo bworoshye.
faq.q2: Ese nshobora kwigira kuri terefoni yanjye?
faq.a2: Yego rwose, uru rubuga rukoze mu buryo bugezweho buhuzwa neza n'uburyo terefoni zose zikora.
faq.q3: Ntabwo nzi Kinyarwanda, ese mwashyizeho izindi ndimi?
faq.a3: Yego, usibye Ikinyarwanda, urubuga rwacu ruraboneka kandi mu Cyongereza (English) no mu Gifaransa (Français).

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.subtitle: Ufite ikibazo cyangwa igitekerezo? Nyabuna twandikire twagufasha.
contact.name: Amazina yawe
contact.success: Ubutumwa bwawe bwoherejwe neza! Tuzagusubiza vuba.

register.title: Fungura Konti Nshya
register.name: Amazina Yombi
register.verificationSent: Imeri yo kwemeza yoherejwe kuri imeri yawe. Nyabuna yemeze mbere yo kwinjira.

dashboard.title: Ibiro Bikuru
dashboard.verifyEmailPrompt: Nyabuna banza wemeze imeri yawe unyuze ku kimenyetso cyoherejwe kuri imeri yawe kugira ngo ukoreshe urubuga ku buryo bwuzuye.
dashboard.verifyCheck: Ese umaze kuyemeza? Kanda hano ngo ugenzure.
dashboard.noExamsYet: Nta kizamini wari wakora na kimwe. Kanda hejuru ngo utangire!

about.title: Turi Bande?
about.p1: KORA RIMWE ni urubuga rugamije korohereza Abanyarwanda n'abandi barutuye kwiga no gutsindira uruhushya rwo gutwara ibinyabiziga mu buryo bworoshye kandi bwa kinyamwuga.
about.p2: Intego yacu ni ugushyiraho amashusho, amasomo, n'ibizamini by'imyitozo bisobanutse kandi by'ubuntu kugira ngo umutekano wo mu muhanda ube ntamakemwa.
